51 Years as your BANKING PARTNER

Since 1974, our products and services have been giving assistance in improving the lives of every Bicolano we have served. A customer-focused bank that provides clients with the best financial solutions to meet their financial needs.

DEPOSITS ARE INSURED BY PDIC UP TO P1,000,000 PER DEPOSITOR.

Financial Consumer Protection

Rural Bank of San Jose (C.S.) Inc is regulated by the Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas(BSP). For any inquiries and complaints, you may (1) call our Branch Customer Service hotline see Branches (Mondays to Fridays from 8:30am to 4:30pm), or (2) send an email to [email protected], or (3) Fill up the Customer Contact form
